## Section one

::: {.content-hidden when-format="revealjs"}
BOOKONLY_MARKER — flowing prose that belongs in the book, not on a slide.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="revealjs"}
- SLIDEONLY_MARKER — a terse bullet for the deck
:::

Shared content runs identically in both outputs:

```{r}
#| echo: true
40 + 2
```

## Section two

::: {.content-visible when-format="revealjs"}
- SLIDEONLY_MARKER again
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="revealjs"}
BOOKONLY_MARKER again — full explanation reserved for the book.
:::
